title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
